nasb.text: You, even You, are to be feared; And who may stand in Your presence when once You are angry?

esv.text: But you, you are to be feared! Who can stand before you when once your anger is roused?

cnv.text: 唯有你是可畏的， 你的烈怒一發出，誰能在你面前站立得住呢？

ccb.text: 唯有你当受敬畏。 你发怒的时候， 谁能在你面前站立呢？

csbs.text: 唯独你是可畏的！ 你的怒气一旦发作， 谁能在你面前站立得住呢？
